'''Jacunas''' were [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] scavengers, although they would eat living creatures as well. They were [[Bird/Legends|birds]] the size of [[Kowakian monkey-lizard/Legends|Kowakian monkey-lizards]] that traveled in packs of up to several dozen. They were able to fly, run, climb, and swing from [[Tree/Legends|tree]] branches.

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
